title: Factorization
description: This mod adds minimalist parts for expanding vanilla redstone automation, and many other things.
body:
# Factorization

This mod adds minimalist parts for expanding vanilla redstone automation, and many other things.

**Command small robots!**

![Command small robots!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XmseIqaa/images/5a9d3f9acdbb34ec36b63373e50b69a125a3a4e1.png)

**Build terracotta armies!**

![Build terracotta armies!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XmseIqaa/images/3fb9e2a199b06cb59f329333849e33aacc5e1c7a.png)

**Spinning blades of death!**

![Spinning blades of death!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XmseIqaa/images/f8b3ba478ebc375c251dcf081fe8bb4dfa116b28.png)

**Twist the very fabric of reality!**

![Twist the very fabric of reality!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XmseIqaa/images/73d230a40295be71fc7ea2244d8bb6d11b0446ae.png)

### Getting Started
First, you must discover the Lost Treasure Map. It was last seen near diamond ore. Treasure maps are very rare and very fragile, so treat it gently. Right-click the map once, and follow it to find a well-guarded stash somewhere on the surface. This stash will contain a Logic Matrix Programmer, and occasionally a few other useful materials.

The Logic Matrix Programmer can then be used in the recipe below to create the Factorization Manual, which can teach you everything worth knowing!

![Crafting the manual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XmseIqaa/images/d5e7371c85ae562600a990ef04abdd848cb3fbb4.png)

Or, [here's an outside-of-Minecraft copy of the manual](http://purpleposeidon.github.io/FzDocs/).

### 1.8 Version 
The port is very incomplete, it is not recommended that you use this version.

### Modpacks
You can use FZ in your modpacks.

### Localizations & Translation
The following people have contributed localizations:

- [crafteverywhere](https://github.com/crafteverywhere), SF_Chipan: zh_CN
- [catmunyi](https://github.com/catmunyi): zh_TW
- [Vexatos](https://github.com/Vexatos): de_DE
- [Darkona](https://github.com/Darkona): es_ES
- [WLCD](https://github.com/WLCD), [AegisLesha](https://github.com/AegisLesha): fr_FR
- [DragonsLover](https://github.com/DragonsLover): fr_CA
- [golyalpha](https://github.com/golyalpha): cs_CZ
- [natiss88](https://github.com/natiss88): it_IT
- [Anton](https://github.com/Anton): ru_RU
- Szewek: pl_PL

### Credits
FZ includes uses Creative Commons sound assets, including:

- ["Old Metal", by digifishmusic](https://freesound.org/people/digifishmusic/sounds/66417/). Unmodified. [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
- ["THE CRASH", by sandyrb](https://freesound.org/people/sandyrb/sounds/95078/). Cropped and combined with other work. [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
- ["Avalanche", by mystiscool](https://freesound.org/people/mystiscool/sounds/7141/). Cropped and combined with other work. [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
- ["Ambienta Soundtrack: Crystal Airlines", by suonho](https://freesound.org/people/suonho/sounds/56364/). Cropped and filtered. [CC BY 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/).
- ["BMW 1150 GS Motorcycle: NZP BMW 1150GS Fuel pump", by Noizemaker](https://freesound.org/people/Noizemaker/sounds/23216/). Cropped, equalized, and mixed with other work. [CC0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/).

### Hammer
Hammer (or FZDS, for FactoriZation Dimensional Slices) is a WIP engine upgrade for Minecraft that gives it the ability to move and rotate chunks arbitrarily. It is used to implement the Colossi and the Twisting Block, with more things to come. Unfortunately there are some bugs that happen with Optifine & bukkit/spigot/cauldron right now, and I'm not really able to fix them. However there will also be bugs with other mods, so please let me know about them. Hammer can be disabled by editing hammerChannels.cfg.

If you're having problems with a colossus or anything else that uses Hammer, you can use the "/fzds +" select and "/fzds remove" to kill them. Or it can be disabled from hammerChannels.cfg.

## Archival notice

**This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was [originally created](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1284592-factorization-0-8-108) Jul 13, 2012 by [neptunepink](https://github.com/purpleposeidon). It has been uploaded to Modrinth under the ModrinthArchives account with permission from the original author.**

[![Twitter screenshot showing permission to upload](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XmseIqaa/images/9b9f92bf1bbb45c8a9d91e70fa5d3a30f24b998b.jpeg)](https://twitter.com/neptunepunk/status/1531094705743597569)
